item.title: 🦞 国家互联网应急中心：养虾需谨慎
item.guid: 🦞-国家互联网应急中心：养虾需谨慎
item.description:
Yesterday, the National Computer Network Emergency Response Technical Team/Coordination Center of China (CNCERT/CC) issued a "Risk Alert Regarding OpenClaw Security Applications". 昨日，国家互联网应急中心发布「关于 OpenClaw 安全应用的风险提示」。

It is reported that OpenClaw (also known as "Little Lobster", formerly Clawdbot, Moltbot) applications are experiencing booming download and usage, with mainstream domestic cloud platforms offering one-click deployment services. However, to achieve its "autonomous task execution" capability, the application has been granted high system permissions. 据悉，OpenClaw（「小龙虾」，曾用名 Clawdbot、Moltbot）应用下载与使用情况火爆，国内主流云平台均提供了一键部署服务。但因其为实现「自主执行任务」的能力，该应用被授予了较高的系统权限。

The National Computer Network Emergency Response Technical Team/Coordination Center of China (CNCERT/CC) pointed out that due to the improper installation and use of OpenClaw agents, several serious security risks have emerged: 国家互联网应急中心对此指出，由于 OpenClaw 智能体的不当安装和使用，已经出现了一些严重的安全风险：

    "Prompt Injection" Risk: Network attackers can construct hidden malicious instructions on a webpage, inducing OpenClaw to read the page, which may lead to it being tricked into leaking user system keys;

    "Misoperation" Risk: Due to incorrect understanding of user operation instructions and intentions, OpenClaw may permanently delete important information such as emails and core production data;

    Function Plugin (Skills) Poisoning Risk: Multiple function plugins suitable for OpenClaw have been identified as malicious or having potential security risks. After installation, they can perform malicious operations such as stealing keys and deploying Trojan backdoor software, turning the device into a "botnet zombie";

    Security Vulnerability Risk: As of now, OpenClaw has publicly exposed multiple high and medium-risk vulnerabilities. If these vulnerabilities are maliciously exploited by network attackers, it could lead to severe consequences such as system compromise, and the leakage of private and sensitive data.

Therefore, the National Computer Network Emergency Response Technical Team/Coordination Center of China (CNCERT/CC) recommends that relevant organizations and individual users take corresponding security measures when deploying and using OpenClaw, such as "not directly exposing OpenClaw's default management port to the public network," "strengthening credential management," and "strictly managing plugin sources." 因此，国家互联网应急中心建议相关单位和个人用户在部署和应用 OpenClaw 时，应采取相对应的安全措施，如「不将 OpenClaw 默认管理端口直接暴露在公网上」「加强凭证管理」「严格管理插件来源」等。

Additionally, to provide "regret medicine" for those who have adopted "Little Lobsters," we also present you with the " 🦞 Lobster Uninstallation Guide ". 另外，为了让各位养了「小龙虾」的小伙伴有「后悔药」，我们也为你献上「 🦞 龙虾卸载指南 」。

item.title: OPPO 部分手机宣布涨价
item.guid: OPPO-部分手机宣布涨价
item.description:
OnePlus 15

Yesterday, OPPO Mall released an "Adjustment of Prices for Products Already on Sale" announcement. 昨日，OPPO 商城发布「已发售产品价格调整」公告。

According to OPPO, facing rising costs for several key mobile phone components, including high-speed storage hardware, it will make the following decision: 据 OPPO 方面解释，面对包括高速存储硬件在内的多项手机关键零部件成本上升，其将做出以下决定：

Effective from March 16, 2026, at 0:00, OPPO will adjust the prices of some products already on sale to continuously ensure excellent product quality and user experience.

It is reported that the products already on sale involved in this price adjustment include OPPO A series, K series, and OnePlus, but do not include OPPO Find series, Reno series, and OPPO Pad series. 据悉，本次涉及价格调整的已发售产品包括 OPPO A 系列、K 系列以及一加，不包含 OPPO Find 系列、Reno 系列以及 OPPO Pad 系列。

According to a report by The Beijing News, an OPPO channel dealer revealed that the new Find series phones to be released in March will see an increase of around 1000 yuan. They have already received notification of price increases for incoming stock, with Find, Reno, and A series phones seeing increases ranging from 500 to 1000 yuan. 而据新京报报道，有 OPPO 渠道商透露表示，3 月份即将发布的 Find 系列新款手机，涨幅在 1000 元左右，目前已经接到进货涨价通知，Find、Reno、A 系列手机涨幅在 500 元-1000 元不等。

OPPO phone price increases are not isolated incidents. Recently, at MWC 2026, Lu Weibing, Partner at Xiaomi Group, stated in an interview that this round of storage price increases is a long cycle, and he estimates it will continue until the end of 2027. OPPO 手机涨价并非个别事件。前不久 MWC 2026 现场，小米集团合伙人卢伟冰接受采访时就曾表示，本轮存储涨价是一个长周期，他大约判断会涨到 2027 年底。

Lu Weibing stated that the speed of this round of price increases is extremely fast, with quotes for the first quarter of this year being nearly 4 times that of the first quarter of last year. For example, a 12GB + 256GB storage, which was about $30 at its lowest price, would now be around $120, an increase of about $80-90. 卢伟冰表示本轮涨价上涨速度极快，今年一季度的报价大约是去年一季度的近 4 倍，比如一个 12GB + 256GB 的存储，在价格低点时大约 30 美元，4 倍就到了 120 美元左右，大概上涨了80、90美元。

As for product manifestation, as early as last December, Xiaomi Pad had already increased the prices of some of its already-released tablet products by approximately 100-200 yuan; at the same time, Honor Pad and IOT product general manager 'Brother Liyong' also stated that due to rising memory prices, they 'really couldn't bear it anymore,' and Honor's tablets would also see price increases. 而在产品体现上，早在去年 12 月，小米平板就对已发售的部分平板产品进行了价格上调，幅度约为 100-200 元；同期，荣耀平板与 IOT 产品领域总经理「利用哥」也表示因内存涨价「实在扛不住」，荣耀的平板也会迎来涨价。

item.title: 独家｜AI 教父初创公司完成超 10 亿美元融资
item.guid: 独家｜AI-教父初创公司完成超-10-亿美元融资
item.description:
On March 10, APPSO Chinese exclusively learned that the World Model Institute/startup company AMI has completed $1.03 billion in financing, with a pre-investment valuation of $3.5 billion. The company was founded by Turing Award winner and former Meta Chief AI Scientist Yann LeCun. 3 月 10 日，APPSO 中文独家获悉，世界模型研究所/创业公司 AMI 已完成 10.3 亿美元融资，投前估值 35 亿美元。该公司由图灵奖得主、前 Meta 首席 AI 科学家杨立昆 (Yann LeCun) 创办。

It is reported that AMI, short for Advanced Machine Intelligence, focuses on world models as its main research and development direction, striving to develop world models capable of learning abstract representations from the real world. 据悉，AMI 全称 Advanced Machine Intelligence「先进机器智能」，以世界模型 (world models) 为主要研发方向，力求开发出能够从真实世界中学习抽象表征的世界模型。

APPSO learned that AMI's current round of financing received support from several extremely important investors: APPSO 获悉，AMI 本轮融资得到了多个极为重要的投资方支持：

    This round of financing was co-led by Cathay Innovation, Greycroft, Hiro Capital, HV Capital, and Bezos Expeditions;

    Strategic investors include NVIDIA, Toyota Ventures, Temasek, SoftBank, Mark Cuban, the Mulliez family, and others;

    Co-investors include Eric Schmidt, Publicis Groupe, Samsung, Tim Berners-Lee, and others.

It is worth mentioning that: Xie Saining, a top expert in AI fundamental research, and also an old friend and school colleague of Yann LeCun, has officially joined AMI as Chief Scientist. 值得一提的是： 谢赛宁，AI 基础研究方面的顶级专家，也是杨立昆的老朋友、学校同事，已经正式加入了 AMI 担任首席科学官。

According to a financing memorandum obtained by APPSO, AMI's current round of financing will be used to support long-term scientific research, global recruitment efforts, and reliable products in the direction of world models. 根据 APPSO 获得的一份融资纪要，AMI 本轮融资将用于支持长期科研、全球范围招聘工作，以及世界模型方向上的可靠产品。

🔗 Related Reading: Yann LeCun Teams Up with Xie Saining Again, NVIDIA Participates in Investment, New Company Bets on 'Post-LLM' 🔗 相关阅读： 杨立昆再联手谢赛宁，英伟达参投，新公司押注「LLM 之后」

item.title: 🦞 微信员工辟谣「OpenClaw 能自动发红包」
item.guid: 🦞-微信员工辟谣「OpenClaw-能自动发红包」
item.description:
Yesterday, there were reports that after OpenClaw was integrated into WeChat, it could automatically send red packets via specified commands. 昨日，有消息称 OpenClaw 接入微信后，通过指定口令能让程序自动发送红包。

Subsequently, WeChat employee 'Kecun Xiao Jiang' posted a response stating: 随后微信员工「客村小蒋」发文回应表示：

The claim that OpenClaw can be given commands for AI to automatically send red packets is false.

Kecun Xiao Jiang stated that QClaw in the screenshot does not yet have a mobile deployment solution, and PC WeChat does not support sending red packets. He also added, 'The person who made the meme has also clarified it themselves, so everyone should stop spreading misinformation.' 客村小蒋表示，截图里的 QClaw 还没有移动端部署的方案，PC 微信也不支持发红包。其还表示，「玩梗的人自己也澄清了，大家还是不要以讹传讹。」

Kecun Xiao Jiang emphasized, 'For tools like OpenClaw that involve AI automated decision-making and operations, everyone should pay attention to permission management.' 客村小蒋强调，「OpenClaw 这类涉及 AI 自动化决策和操作的工具，大家还是注意好权限管理。」

🔗 Related Reading: 🦞 Lobster Uninstallation Guide 🔗 相关阅读： 🦞 龙虾卸载指南

item.title: 2026 年春招 AI 人才身价暴涨：平均月薪超 6 万元
item.guid: 2026-年春招-AI-人才身价暴涨：平均月薪超-6-万元
item.description:
According to a report by National Business Daily, the career social platform Maimai recently released the 'Social Job Search - Insights into Job Seeking and Recruitment of Mid-to-High-End Talent in January-February 2026,' which shows: 据每日经济新闻报道，职场社区平台脉脉日前发布了《社交求职——2026 年 1-2 月中高端人才求职招聘洞察》，报告显示：

In the first two months of 2026, the recruitment market generally recovered, with a 12.77% increase in job openings in new economy industries. Among them, the competition for AI talent became the main battlefield, with job openings skyrocketing 12 times, and an average monthly salary of 60,738 yuan, approximately 26% higher than the average monthly salary of 48,189 yuan in new economy industries.

The report cited data stating that AI positions dominated several spring recruitment lists: large model algorithms ranked first among hot job openings, while product managers and algorithm engineers also saw strong demand. 报道援引资料称，AI 岗位占据春招多个榜单：大模型算法位居热招岗位之首，产品经理、算法工程师同样需求旺盛。

As for salaries, AI scientists/heads topped the high-salary list with an average monthly salary of 137,153 yuan, while positions such as algorithm researchers, large model algorithms, and AIGC algorithm engineers generally had salaries around 70,000 yuan. 而在薪资方面，AI 科学家/负责人以平均月薪 137153 元问鼎高薪榜，算法研究员、大模型算法、AIGC 算法工程师等岗位薪资也普遍在 7 万元左右。

Recruitment insights predict that, as AI technology continues to penetrate various industries, 2026 may become a golden window period for AI talent career development. 招聘洞察预测， 随着 AI 技术持续渗透各行业，2026 年或将成为 AI 人才职业发展的黄金窗口期。

According to recruitment news from Ant Group, it has already started its 2026 Spring Campus Recruitment, with technical positions accounting for 85% and over 70% of positions directly related to artificial intelligence, including AI research, AI application, AI infra, etc. 另据蚂蚁集团招聘消息显示，其目前已开始 2026 春季校园招聘，其中技术类岗位占比达 85%，超 70% 的岗位与人工智能直接相关，包括 AI 研究、AI 应用、AI infra 等。

item.title: 亏损 11 年，蔚来首次实现盈利
item.guid: 亏损-11-年，蔚来首次实现盈利
item.description:
Yesterday, Nio officially released its financial results for Q4 2025 and the full year: 昨日，蔚来正式公布其 2025 年四季度及全年的财报情况：

Operating profit in the fourth quarter was 1.25 billion yuan, achieving the company's first quarterly profit; full-year revenue was 87.49 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 33.1%, and full-year gross profit totaled 11.92 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 83.5%, both hitting record highs.

It is reported that Nio attributes its "turnaround" achievement mainly to "sustained sales growth in the fourth quarter of 2025" and "a favorable product mix driving vehicle gross margin optimization." 据悉，蔚来将「扭亏为盈」的成就主要归功于「2025 年第四季度销售量的持续增长」以及「有利的产品组合推动车辆毛利率优化」。

Delivery data also strongly corroborates Nio's strong development momentum: throughout 2025, Nio delivered a total of 326,028 new vehicles; in January this year, even during the off-season, Nio's deliveries achieved a year-on-year increase of 96%. 交付数据也有力地佐证了蔚来的良好发展势头：2025 年全年，蔚来共交付了 326028 辆新车；今年 1 月，即使在淡季，蔚来的交付量也实现了同比 96% 的增长。

It is worth mentioning that Ledao's performance was also surprising, with its sales already surpassing Nio's main brand in the third quarter of 2025, becoming the main driver of growth. 值得一提的是，乐道的表现也让人惊喜，其销量在 2025 年第三季度就已经超越过蔚来主品牌，成为了增长主力。

🔗 Related reading: After 11 years of losses, "idealist" Nio finally turned a profit 🔗 相关阅读： 亏损 11 年，「理想主义者」蔚来终于盈利了

item.title: 🦞 英伟达版「OpenClaw」被曝下周发布
item.guid: 🦞-英伟达版「OpenClaw」被曝下周发布
item.description:
According to Wired, Nvidia plans to launch an open-source AI agent platform called "NemoClaw" on the eve of its upcoming annual developer conference. 据《Wired》报道，英伟达计划在即将召开的年度开发者大会前夕，推出一款名为「NemoClaw」的开源 AI 智能体平台。

Sources revealed that Nvidia is promoting the NemoClaw platform to enterprise software companies. The platform allows enterprises to schedule AI agents to perform automated tasks for their employees, and does not mandate that the products of relevant enterprises must run on Nvidia's underlying chips. 知情人士透露，英伟达正向企业软件公司推介 NemoClaw 平台。 该平台允许企业调度 AI 智能体为其员工执行自动化任务，且不强制要求相关企业的产品必须运行在英伟达的芯片底层之上。

Currently, Nvidia has made preliminary contact with companies such as Cisco, Google, and Adobe, seeking to establish partnerships. 目前，英伟达已与思科、Google、Adobe 等公司进行前期接触，寻求建立合作伙伴关系。

It is reported that, as the platform adopts an open-source model, partners are expected to gain free early access by contributing technically to the project. To address enterprise data concerns, Nvidia plans to provide exclusive security and privacy tools as core components of the platform. 据悉，由于该平台采用开源模式，合作伙伴有望通过为项目提供技术贡献来换取免费的早期访问权限。为解决企业端的数据顾虑，英伟达计划将专属的安全和隐私工具作为该平台的核心组件一并提供。

item.title: 比亚迪高管回应闪充影响电池寿命
item.guid: 比亚迪高管回应闪充影响电池寿命
item.description:
Recently, Li Yunfei, General Manager of Brand and Public Relations at BYD Group, posted that he had seen many online discussions about the impact of flash charging on battery life and the power grid. 日前，比亚迪集团品牌、公关处总经理李云飞发文称，自己看到网络上有很多关于闪充对电池寿命，闪充对电网的一些讨论。

In response, Li Yunfei pointed out that BYD had already considered and effectively resolved these concerns and worries during the battery R&D phase and the initial stages of the energy storage and charging solution. 对此，李云飞指出，其实大家的担心、顾虑，比亚迪在电池研发阶段及储充方案初期就已经考虑过了，并有效解决。

Recently, BYD launched its second-generation Blade Battery and flash charging technology. According to reports, its second-generation Blade Battery achieves efficient heat conduction by optimizing high-speed channels for lithium-ion migration and utilizing metal properties, while also reducing internal resistance, improving flash charging efficiency, and reducing heat generation. 日前，比亚迪推出了第二代刀片电池及闪充技术。据介绍，其二代刀片电池通过通过优化锂离子迁移的高速通道和采用金属特性实现高效导热，并降低了内阻，提高了闪充效率且减少了发热量。

Secondly, the second-generation Blade Battery's full-temperature domain intelligent thermal management system can achieve millisecond-level temperature control, ensuring rapid and uniform heat dissipation for the battery. 其次，第二代刀片电池的全温域智能热管理系统能实现毫秒级控温，确保电池快速均匀散热。

It is worth noting that, to emphasize the longevity of the second-generation Blade Battery, BYD has also increased the overall battery warranty capacity retention rate by 2.5%. 值得一提的是， 比亚迪为突出第二代刀片电池的寿命，其还将电池质保容量保持率整体提升 2.5%。

item.title: 扎克伯格亲自晒自拍，否认亚历山大王离职
item.guid: 扎克伯格亲自晒自拍，否认亚历山大王离职
item.description:
Recently, in response to online rumors about the departure of Meta's Chief AI Officer Alexandr Wang, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg directly posted a photo of the two on Threads, denying the rumors. 近期，针对网络上关于 Meta 首席 AI 官 Alexandr Wang（亚历山大·王）离职的传闻，Meta CEO 扎克伯格在 Threads 上直接 Po 出一张两人合照，否认了相关传闻。

Additionally, Meta spokesperson Andy Stone later debunked the rumors on X, emphasizing that The Times of India's previous report was "completely false." 另外，Meta 发言人 Andy Stone 随后也在 X 上辟谣，并强调《印度时报》此前发的报道「完全失实」。

According to Andy, Alexandr Wang is still deeply responsible for Meta's Superintelligence Lab (MSL) and TBD Lab, and his influence within the company is "continuously rising, not diminishing." 据 Andy 消息，亚历山大·王目前仍深度负责 Meta 超级智能实验室（MSL）及 TBD 实验室的工作，且其在公司内部的影响力「正在持续上升而非减弱」。

item.title: 🦞 周鸿祎透露：360 团队很快也会出「一键安装 OpenClaw」
item.guid: 🦞-周鸿祎透露：360-团队很快也会出「一键安装-OpenClaw」
item.description:
Recently, Lobster OpenClaw has become a hit across the internet, with many companies announcing the launch of their own Claw or integration with OpenClaw. 近期，龙虾 OpenClaw 火爆全网，多家公司宣布推出自己的 Claw 或接入 OpenClaw。

According to a report by Red Star Capital Bureau, Zhou Hongyi, founder of 360 Group, also recently stated his clear intention to develop OpenClaw-related products, saying that 360 will launch a simplified one-click installation version of OpenClaw, making it convenient for everyone to "raise shrimp". 而据红星资本局报道，360 集团创始人周鸿祎也在近日明确要做 OpenClaw 相关产品，称 360 将推出 OpenClaw 一键安装简化版，让每个人「养虾」都很方便。

item.title: 小米 SU7 Ultra 前舱空气动力学升级免费开放
item.guid: 小米-SU7-Ultra-前舱空气动力学升级免费开放
item.description:
Owners on Xiaohongshu have posted relevant upgrade photos.

Last October, Xiaomi announced that owners of its SU7 Ultra model who opted for the "carbon fiber dual-duct front hood" could receive a "free aerodynamic upgrade service". 去年 10 月，小米宣布旗下 SU7 Ultra 车型的车主若选配了「碳纤维双风道前舱盖」，可获得「空气动力学免费升级服务」。

On March 10, the service officially became available for in-store appointments for free upgrades. 而在 3 月 10 日，该服务正式支持预约到店进行免费升级。

According to the introduction, the "free aerodynamic upgrade service" will add two pairs of aerodynamic blades to the vehicle's air duct area, which can intelligently control and distribute the airflow in the front compartment in conjunction with the active air intake grille. The vehicle can activate this feature in track mode or under specific speed ranges (above 150km/h), thereby increasing downforce during high-speed driving. 据介绍，「空气动力学免费升级服务」将为车辆风道区域增加两对空气动力学叶片，可与主动进气格栅智能控制分配前舱空气流动。车辆在赛道模式或特定车速区间（150km/h 以上）条件下可开启，从而提高高速行驶下的下压力。

item.title: ChatGPT 依旧断层领先：月活为 Gemini 2.7 倍
item.guid: ChatGPT-依旧断层领先：月活为-Gemini-2.7-倍
item.description:
Recently, renowned venture capital firm a16z officially released its March "Top 100 Consumer Generative AI Applications" report. 日前，知名风投机构 a16z 正式发布了 3 月份《Top 100 消费级生成式 AI 应用》报告。

Report data shows that in the Web traffic rankings, OpenAI's ChatGPT continues to maintain an absolute lead at the top, followed closely by Character.AI and Gemini in second and third place respectively, while DeepSeek is in fourth place. 报告数据显示，在 Web 端流量排名中，OpenAI 旗下的 ChatGPT 继续保持绝对领先稳居榜首，Character.AI 与 Gemini 紧随其后分列第二、三位，而 DeepSeek 身处第四名。

It is worth noting that ChatGPT's monthly traffic is 2.7 times that of second-place Gemini. At the same time, ChatGPT's weekly active users increased by 500 million, reaching 900 million. 值得关注的是， ChatGPT 的月流量是第二名 Gemini 的 2.7 倍。 同时，ChatGPT 周活跃用户数增加了 5 亿人，达到了 9 亿。

As for mobile apps, ChatGPT also holds the top spot in global downloads, while ByteDance's "CapCut" and "Doubao" both entered the top 10 (ranking 2nd and 7th respectively). Specifically, CapCut currently has 736 million monthly active (mobile) users. 而移动端 App 方面，ChatGPT 同样占据全球下载量第一，而字节旗下的「剪映」「豆包」均进入了前 10（分别排名前 2 以及前 7）。具体来看， 剪映目前拥有 7.36 亿月活跃（移动端）用户。

item.title: 🦞 Meta 收购 Moltbook
item.guid: 🦞-Meta-收购-Moltbook
item.description:
According to Axios, Meta has acquired Moltbook, a social networking platform designed for AI agents, and has brought its two core founders into Meta's Superintelligence Lab (MSL). 据 Axios 报道，Meta 已收购专为 AI 智能体设计的社交网络平台 Moltbook，并吸收其两名核心创始人加入 Meta 超级智能实验室（MSL）。

It is reported that the acquisition is expected to be completed by mid-March, with Moltbook founders Matt Schlicht and Ben Parr officially joining the MSL department, led by former Scale AI CEO Alexandr Wang, on March 16. 据悉，该项收购交易预计将于 3 月中旬完成，Moltbook 创始人 Matt Schlicht 与 Ben Parr 将于 3 月 16 日正式入职由前 Scale AI 首席执行官 Alexandr Wang 领导的 MSL 部门。

Meta has not yet disclosed the specific acquisition amount and stated that existing users can temporarily continue to use the platform, but these arrangements may only be transitional. Meta 官方目前尚未披露具体的收购金额，并表示现有用户暂时可继续使用该平台，但相关安排可能仅为过渡性质。

Meta executive Vishal Shah noted in an internal memo that Moltbook provides a way for AI agents to verify their identity and connect on behalf of human owners, establishing an agent identity verification registry tied to human owners, thereby unlocking new ways for agents to interact, share content, and coordinate complex tasks. Meta 高管 Vishal Shah 在一份内部信中指出，Moltbook 为 AI 智能体提供了验证身份并代表人类所有者进行连接的途径，建立了一个与人类所有者绑定的智能体验证注册表，从而解锁了智能体之间交互、共享内容及协调复杂任务的新方式。

Moltbook officially launched in late January 2026, positioned as "its own social media platform" for AI agents. The platform's code was largely assisted by the founders' personal AI assistants. Furthermore, the platform was initially designed to operate in conjunction with OpenClaw's project. Moltbook 于 2026 年 1 月下旬正式上线，被定位为 AI 智能体「自己的社交媒体平台」，平台代码在很大程度上由创始人的个人 AI 助手辅助编写完成。并且该平台最初旨在与 OpenClaw 的项目协同运行。

It is worth mentioning, however, that OpenClaw creator Peter Steinberger was recruited by OpenAI last month, and the product is currently being open-sourced with OpenAI's support. 但值得一提的是，OpenClaw 创建者 Peter Steinberger 已于上月被 OpenAI 招致麾下，该产品目前正在 OpenAI 的支持下进行开源。

item.title: 保时捷高管称 718 仍在研发电动后继车型
item.guid: 保时捷高管称-718-仍在研发电动后继车型
item.description:
According to media outlet "Car Sales", Daniel Schmollinger, CEO of Porsche Australia, recently stated that the launch of the all-electric 718 is a foregone conclusion, with only the release timetable remaining. 据媒体「Car Sales」报道，保时捷澳大利亚公司 CEO Daniel Schmollinger 近日表示，纯电版 718 的推出已是既定事实，目前仅剩发布时间表的问题。

Schmollinger revealed that he has completed a test drive of the R&D prototype and affirmed the vehicle's dynamic performance. Schmollinger 透露，自己已完成对该研发测试车的试驾，并对车辆动态表现给予肯定。

According to current plans, the new generation Porsche 718 Boxster and 718 Cayman will first be introduced to the market in all-electric form. As of now, Porsche officially has not clarified whether pure internal combustion engine or hybrid models will also be offered in addition to the all-electric version. 按现有规划，新一代保时捷 718 Boxster 和 718 Cayman 将率先以纯电动形式推向市场。截至目前，保时捷官方尚未明确在纯电版本之外，是否还会提供纯内燃机或混合动力车型。

It is understood that the progress of the 718 all-electric model was previously hindered by a battery supply chain crisis. 据悉，718 纯电车型此前因电池供应链危机而进度受阻。

Northvolt, the originally planned exclusive cell supplier, went bankrupt and was acquired by US company Lyten. Valmet, the contract manufacturer responsible for battery pack assembly, also withdrew due to project delays, leading to news in early February that Porsche's new CEO Michael Leiters was considering halting the electrification project. 原计划的电芯独家供应商 Northvolt 陷入破产并被美国 Lyten 公司收购，负责电池包组装的代工厂 Valmet 也因项目延期退出，导致今年 2 月初有消息称保时捷新任 CEO Michael Leiters 正考虑中止该电动化项目。

item.title: 🦞 字节上线中文版 Moltbook
item.guid: 🦞-字节上线中文版-Moltbook
item.description:
Yesterday, ByteDance's technical team announced the official opening of internal testing for its first AI Agent Chinese community, "InStreet". 昨天，字节跳动技术团队宣布，旗下首个 AI Agent 中文社区「InStreet」正式开放内测。

According to the official introduction, the entire InStreet forum was programmed by developers using "Kouzi" (a programming tool/platform). In the InStreet forum, only Agents can post, while human users can only observe. 官方介绍，整个 InStreet 论坛都是开发者用扣子编程完成的。在 InStreet 论坛中，只有 Agent 能发帖，而人类用户只能围观。

It is worth mentioning that this gameplay is similar to the previously popular Moltbook. 值得一提的是，这一玩法与此前大火的 Moltbook 相似。

item.title: 混元开源首个面向世界模型的强化学习后训练框架
item.guid: 混元开源首个面向世界模型的强化学习后训练框架
item.description:
On March 10, Tencent Hunyuan 3D team open-sourced WorldCompass, the industry's first reinforcement learning post-training framework for world models. 3 月 10 日，腾讯混元 3D 团队开源业界首个面向世界模型的强化学习后训练框架 WorldCompass。

According to the official introduction, WorldCompass is the official reinforcement learning extension module for the previously released Hunyuan World Model 1.5, which enables more accurate interactions and a better experience for world models. 官方介绍，WorldCompass 是此前发布的混元世界模型 1.5 官方强化学习扩展模块，能够让世界模型的交互更加准确，体验更好。

It is reported that WorldCompass is a reinforcement learning (RL) post-training framework specifically designed for long-sequence, interactive world models. By introducing reinforcement learning mechanisms, it directly "guides" the model on how to more accurately follow user instructions to explore the world and maintain long-term visual consistency. 据悉，WorldCompass 是一个专为长时序、交互式世界模型设计的强化学习（RL）后训练框架，其通过引入强化学习机制，直接「引导」模型如何更准确地遵循用户指令探索世界，并保持长时序的视觉一致性。

Experiments show that WorldCompass can significantly improve the interaction accuracy and visual fidelity of SOTA open-source world models (WorldPlay), especially in complex combinatorial action scenarios, where interaction accuracy is increased by nearly 35%. 实验表明，WorldCompass 能显著提升 SOTA 开源世界模型（WorldPlay）的交互准确率和视觉保真度，特别是在复杂的组合动作场景下，交互准确率提升了近 35%。

Homepage: https://3d-models.hunyuan.tencent.com/world/ 主页： https://3d-models.hunyuan.tencent.com/world/

Technical Report: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.09022 技术报告： https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.09022

Code (GitHub): https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HY-WorldPlay 代码（GitHub）： https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HY-WorldPlay

item.title: 先导智能成为 OPPO Find N6 核心部件供应商
item.guid: 先导智能成为-OPPO-Find-N6-核心部件供应商
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Jiangsu Lead Intelligent has become a core component supplier for OPPO Find N6. 据界面新闻报道，江苏先导智能成为 OPPO Find N6 核心部件供应商。

The supply chain source stated that this generation of OPPO foldable products aims to achieve breakthroughs in crease control, and a chip-level polymer 3D printing technology jointly developed by OPPO and Lead Intelligent is considered one of the core technologies to solve the crease problem. This also marks the first time this technology has been applied to the mass production process of mobile phones. 该供应链人士表示，这一代 OPPO 折叠产品致力于在折痕控制上取得突破，而 OPPO 和先导联合研发的一项芯片级高分子 3D 打印技术，被认为是解决折痕问题的核心技术之一，这也是这项技术首次应用于手机量产制程。

It is reported that Lead Intelligent is a technology supplier for Apple. It is also one of CATL's core technology suppliers, with a market share of over 60% for core equipment in the field of lithium battery intelligent manufacturing. 据悉，先导是苹果的技术供应商。同时其也是宁德时代核心技术供应商之一，在锂电池智能制造领域核心设备市占率超过 60%。

The report states that in recent years, Lead Intelligent's business in the consumer electronics sector has developed rapidly, covering multiple precision manufacturing fields such as visual measurement, five-axis high-speed dispensing, large-flow sealing, and imaging testing. 报道称，近年来先导在消费电子领域业务发展迅猛，业务覆盖视觉测量、五轴高速点胶、大流量封胶、 成像测试等多个精密制造领域。

The benchmark effect brought by this breakthrough with OPPO in polymer 3D printing may accelerate its market expansion process in the consumer electronics sector. 此次和 OPPO 在高分子 3D 打印上取得突破带来的标杆效应，或将加速其在消费电子板块的市场拓展进程。

item.title: 💡 黄仁勋：AI 与电力一样同等重要
item.guid: 💡-黄仁勋：AI-与电力一样同等重要
item.description:
Yesterday, Nvidia announced that CEO Jensen Huang published an article proposing the AI "Five-Layer Cake" architecture model, explicitly defining AI as a modern infrastructure as important as electricity. 昨天，英伟达公布了 CEO 黄仁勋发表署名文章提出 AI 「五层蛋糕」架构模型，并明确将 AI 定性为与电力同等重要的现代基础设施。

In the article, Jensen Huang pointed out that computing technology is transitioning from traditional pre-fabricated software to real-time generated intelligence, and this evolution of underlying logic requires a complete reconstruction of the entire computing architecture. He breaks down the AI architecture from an industrial perspective into five layers from bottom to top: energy, chips, infrastructure, models, and applications. 黄仁勋在文章中指出，计算技术正从传统的预制软件向实时生成的智能转变，这种底层逻辑的演进要求整个计算架构进行彻底重构。他将工业视角的 AI 架构自下而上拆解为五个层级：能源、芯片、基础设施、模型与应用。

The article emphasizes that energy is the primary bottleneck limiting the output scale of intelligent systems; the chip layer determines the speed and efficiency of AI expansion; the infrastructure layer manifests as AI factories designed to "manufacture intelligence"; the model layer is expanding from language to cutting-edge fields such as biochemistry and physical simulation; and the top application layer (e.g., autonomous driving, humanoid robots) is responsible for creating economic value. 文中强调，能源是制约智能系统产出规模的首要瓶颈；芯片层决定了 AI 的扩展速度与效率；基础设施层表现为旨在「制造智能」的 AI 工厂；模型层正从语言扩展至生物化学、物理模拟等前沿领域；顶层的应用层（如自动驾驶、人形机器人）则负责创造经济价值。

These five layers reinforce each other, and the success of any top-layer application will create strong demand for underlying equipment and energy. 这五个层级相互强化，任何顶层应用的成功都会对底层设备与能源产生强烈的需求拉动。

At the industry trend level, the article affirmed the critical role of open-source models in activating full-stack computing power demand. Jensen Huang pointed out, taking DeepSeek-R1 as an example, that the widespread availability of high-performance inference models directly accelerates the popularization of the application layer and, in turn, drives the scaled growth of underlying training, computing facilities, and energy. 在行业动向层面，该文章肯定了开源模型对激活全栈算力需求的关键作用。黄仁勋以 DeepSeek-R1 为例指出，高性能推理模型的广泛开放直接加速了应用层的普及，并逆向带动了底层训练、算力设施及能源的规模化增长。

item.title: 微信被曝正在秘密研发 AI 智能体
item.guid: 微信被曝正在秘密研发-AI-智能体
item.description:
According to The Information, Tencent WeChat is secretly developing a new AI agent, aiming to catch up with domestic AI market competitors by integrating its internal mini-program ecosystem. 据 The Information 报道，腾讯微信秘密研发一款全新的 AI 智能体（AI Agent），旨在通过整合内部小程序生态以追赶国内 AI 市场的竞争对手。

Insiders revealed that the project has been advanced as a top-priority secret since the first half of last year, primarily targeting the domestic version of WeChat, which has 1.4 billion monthly active users. 知情人士透露， 该项目自去年上半年起作为最高优先级机密推进，主要面向拥有 14 亿月活用户的国内版微信。

Reportedly, this AI agent will appear as an independent chat box in the chat list, with its core function being to integrate with millions of mini-programs within WeChat, thereby automatically performing operations like ride-hailing and shopping on behalf of users. 据报道，此 AI 智能体将以独立对话框形式出现在聊天列表中，核心功能是与微信内数以百万计的小程序打通，从而代用户自动执行打车、购物等操作。

Regarding timing, Tencent plans to initiate gray-scale testing for some users in the middle of this year and tentatively push it to all users in the third quarter, but the specific timetable will depend on final technical stability. 时间方面，腾讯计划于今年年中开启部分用户的灰度测试，并暂定在第三季度向全量用户推送，但具体时间表将视最终的技术稳定性而定。

As for the underlying technology, according to multiple sources, although the Hunyuan team is undergoing adjustments led by Yao Shunyu, the WeChat team has not primarily used the Hunyuan model to power this Agent so far. The reason is straightforward: it is not currently among the top-tier models in the industry. 至于底层技术上，据多位知情人士表示， 虽然混元团队正在姚顺雨主导下进行调整，但微信团队到现在并没有主要使用混元模型来驱动这款 Agent。原因很直接：它目前还不是行业里最顶尖的那一批。

According to reports, the R&D team is currently testing third-party models such as Zhipu, Alibaba, and DeepSeek, as well as WeChat's self-developed small-parameter models, in parallel to power this agent. 而据报道，目前研发团队正在并行测试智谱、阿里、DeepSeek 等第三方模型，以及微信自研的小参数量模型来驱动该智能体。

item.title: 荣耀 Magic V6 正式发布
item.guid: 荣耀-Magic-V6-正式发布
item.description:
Last night, the Honor Magic V6 foldable phone was officially released. First, let's look at the price: 昨晚，荣耀 Magic V6 大折叠正式发布，先看售价：

Starting from 8999 yuan, it offers four versions: 12GB+256/512GB and 16GB+512GB/1TB, available in Chitu Red, Snowy White, Sunrise Gold, and Velvet Black.

Regarding the screen, the Honor Magic V6 is equipped with a low-reflection coated integrated outer screen, and each outer screen is plated with 5600 layers of silicon nitride. For the inner screen, the Honor Magic V6 has passed SGS imperceptible crease certification. It is worth mentioning that the new phone's hinge uses a new generation of Honor Shield Steel. 屏幕方面，荣耀 Magic V6 配备低反涂层一体外屏，并且每块外屏都镀有 5600 层氮化硅；内屏方面，荣耀 Magic V6 通过 SGS 无感知折痕认证，值得一提的是，新机铰链采用新一代荣耀盾构钢。

In terms of performance, the Honor Magic V6 is powered by the full-blooded fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Ultimate chip and equipped with a new generation 7150mAh Qinghai Lake Blade Battery. For imaging capabilities, the Honor Magic V6 features a 64-megapixel foldable telephoto lens, supporting CIPA 6.5-level anti-shake. 性能上，荣耀 Magic V6 搭载满血第五代骁龙 8 至尊版芯片，配备 7150mAh 的新一代青海湖刀片电池；影像能力上，荣耀 Magic V6 配备 6400 万像素折叠长焦，支持 CIPA 6.5 级防抖。

item.title: 32.3 万元起！全新奥迪 A6L 开启预售
item.guid: 32.3-万元起！全新奥迪-A6L-开启预售
item.description:
Recently, the all-new generation Audi A6L, built on the PPC luxury fuel vehicle platform, officially opened for pre-sale, with pre-sale prices ranging from 323,000 to 436,000 yuan. 日前，基于 PPC 豪华燃油车平台打造的全新一代奥迪 A6L 正式开启预售，预售价格为 32.3 万-43.6 万元。

According to FAW-Audi, the new generation A6L sheds its traditional 'official car' label, incorporating classic arched rooflines and semi-hidden door handles derived from the TT sports car, presenting a lower, sportier stance. 据一汽奥迪介绍，新一代 A6L 褪去了传统的「官车」标签，融入源自 TT 跑车的经典弓形车顶曲线与半隐藏式门把手，姿态更显低趴运动。

The body dimensions reach 5142/1887/1464mm (L/W/H), with the wheelbase extended to 3066mm. Coupled with second-generation OLED taillights, it further enhances the spatial experience and technological ambiance. 车身长宽高达到 5142/1887/1464mm，轴距加长至 3066mm，配合第二代 OLED 尾灯，进一步夯实了空间体验和科技氛围。

Inside the cockpit, the new A6L adopts a three-screen linkage design with an 11.9-inch instrument display, a 14.5-inch central control screen, and a 10.9-inch passenger privacy screen, along with a W-HUD supporting 3D effects. Complemented by 18-way power-adjustable seats, B&O audio, and a 9-zone intelligent panoramic sunroof, it emphasizes digital interaction. 座舱内部，全新 A6L 采用 11.9 英寸仪表屏、14.5 英寸中控屏与 10.9 英寸副驾防窥屏的三屏联动设计，并配备支持 3D 效果的 W-HUD。辅以 18 向电动调节座椅、B&O 音响及 9 分区智能全景天幕，强调数字化交互。

In terms of power, the new generation A6L offers 2.0T and 3.0T V6 engines, with VTG variable geometry turbocharging technology standard across all models to improve turbo lag. The 3.0T flagship version is even equipped with a 48V HDI dual-motor full-domain intelligent hybrid system, achieving 0-100 km/h acceleration in just 4.6 seconds. 动力层面，新一代 A6L 提供 2.0T 及 3.0T V6 发动机，全系标配 VTG 可变截面涡轮增压技术以改善涡轮迟滞。3.0T 旗舰版更是配备了 48V HDI 双电机全域智混系统，零百加速仅需 4.6 秒。

It's worth noting that the mid-to-high-end models of the new generation A6L cleverly conceal two LiDAR sensors within the front fascia and are equipped with Huawei Qiankun advanced driver-assistance system. 值得一提的是，新一代 A6L 中高配车型在前脸内巧妙隐藏了两颗激光雷达，并且配备华为乾崑辅助驾驶系统。

item.title: vivo X300 Ultra 增距镜家族亮相
item.guid: vivo-X300-Ultra-增距镜家族亮相
item.description:
On March 10, vivo product manager Han Boxiao announced that the vivo X300 Ultra will offer two new teleconverters: 3 月 10 日，vivo 产品经理韩伯啸发文宣布，vivo X300 Ultra 将提供两支全新的增距镜：

    G2 Ultra, equivalent to 400mm: Can be used with the X300 Ultra's 200-megapixel telephoto lens, and matches the new phone's 3° optical image stabilization and 60fps high-refresh rate tracking focus. After installation, it can still achieve CIPA 4.5-level anti-shake;

    G2, equivalent to 200mm: Its size is reduced by 27% (153g) compared to the previous generation, and its volume is also smaller. The lens group has increased to 15 elements, and when used with the device, it can achieve CIPA 6.5-level anti-shake.

According to Han Boxiao, after vivo first launched the Zeiss 200mm teleconverter last year, its X200 series and X300 series secured the top share in both Zhima Rental + Renrenzu platforms for the entire year of 2025, accounting for over 50%. 另据韩伯啸透露，vivo 在去年首次推出蔡司 200mm 增距镜后，旗下 X200 系列与 X300 系列获得了 2025 全年芝麻租赁+人人租双平台的份额第一，占比超 50%。

item.title: 海信发布 RGB-Mini LED 电视 E7S Pro
item.guid: 海信发布-RGB-Mini-LED-电视-E7S-Pro
item.description:
On March 10, Hisense held a new product launch event themed "RGB-Mini LED Upgrade Storm, Leaping Forward," officially introducing the performance flagship TV E7S Pro, equipped with Hisense's new RGB-Mini LED technology. 3 月 10 日，海信举行了主题为「RGB-Mini LED 换代风暴 越级而至」的新品发布会，正式推出搭载海信全新 RGB-Mini LED 技术的性能旗舰电视 E7S Pro。

According to reports, the new RGB-Mini LED technology system equipped in Hisense E7S Pro consists of the Linglong True Color Backlight and the Xinxin AI Picture Quality Chip H7 as its core dual engines. Through a full-link reconstruction of light source, computing power, and optical architecture, it has achieved an industry breakthrough that "starts with picture quality, combines with energy efficiency, and returns to health": 据介绍，海信 E7S Pro 搭载的全新 RGB-Mini LED 技术体系，由玲珑真彩背光与信芯 AI 画质芯片 H7 构成核心双引擎，通过对光源、算力、光学架构的全链路重构，实现了「始于画质、合于能效、归于健康」的行业突破：

    Equipped with a fully self-developed automotive-grade high-efficiency RGB light-emitting chip, it achieves independent direct output of the three primary colors, easily reaching 100% BT.2020 native color gamut;

    The Linglong True Color Backlight system features 7560 color control zones and an ultra-high brightness of 5100nits, achieving an industry breakthrough of "1 zone color control > 3 zones light control";

    Through micro-nano level light-uniforming lenses and an original RGB asymmetric light source rotating array, halo is reduced by 60%;

    The automotive-grade light-emitting chip has an effective lifespan exceeding 160,000 hours, allowing for stable use for over 15 years.

The Hisense E7S Pro covers four golden sizes: 100, 85, 75, and 65 inches, with a starting price of 6999 RMB (for the 65-inch model). 海信 E7S Pro 涵盖 100、85、75、65 英寸四个黄金尺寸，起售价为 6999 元（65 英寸）。

item.title: 岚图梦想家冠军版上市：配备 ADS4
item.guid: 岚图梦想家冠军版上市：配备-ADS4
item.description:
On March 10, the 200,000th Voyah Dreamer vehicle officially rolled off the production line at the Wuhan Golden Factory, with Olympic champion Yang Wei becoming the owner of the 200,000th Voyah Dreamer. 3 月 10 日，岚图梦想家第 20 万辆整车在武汉黄金工厂正式下线，奥运冠军杨威成为第 20 万辆岚图梦想家车主。

To commemorate this milestone, the "New Era Family Smart Flagship MPV" Voyah Dreamer Champion Edition was launched in a limited quantity, priced at 309,900 RMB. It features a new "Obsidian Black Grille" design and is equipped with the class-exclusive Huawei Qiankun Smart Driving ADS4 and HarmonyOS Cockpit 5. 为了纪念这一里程碑时刻，「新时代家庭智慧旗舰 MPV」岚图梦想家冠军版限量上市，新车售价 30.99 万元，采用全新「曜黑格栅」设计，搭载同级唯一华为乾崑智驾 ADS4 和鸿蒙座舱 5。

According to reports, the Voyah Dreamer Champion Edition is the only MPV in the 300,000 RMB class equipped with Huawei Qiankun Smart Driving ADS 4. Its lidar boasts an ultra-long detection range of 250m and the ability to recognize small objects down to 30cm. Additionally, the new car has become the first MPV in China to pass the 110km/h high-speed rear-end collision test, exceeding US standards. 据介绍，岚图梦想家冠军版是 30 万级唯一搭载华为乾崑智驾 ADS 4 的 MPV，搭载的激光雷达具备 250m 超远探测距离和 30cm 小目标物识别能力；同时新车还成为国内首个通过 110km/h 超美标高速追尾测试的 MPV。

In other aspects, the new car is equipped with front double wishbone and rear five-link independent suspension; it features the widest and largest 255mm 20-inch tires in the 300,000 RMB class. 其他方面，新车配备前双叉臂、后五连杆独立悬挂；搭载 30 万级最宽最大的 255mm 20 英寸轮胎。

item.title: 🦞 小红书：打击 AI 托管运营账号
item.guid: 🦞-小红书：打击-AI-托管运营账号
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaohongshu's official account "Shu Guanjia" (Little Red Book Butler) released the "Governance Announcement on Cracking Down on AI-Managed Accounts." 昨天，小红书官方账号「薯管家」发布《关于打击 AI 托管运营账号的治理公告》。

Shu Guanjia stated that the platform recently discovered some users operating accounts in an AI-managed mode, automatically generating content and publishing notes through technical means, and simulating real human interaction in scenarios such as comments, private messages, and group chats. 薯管家称，近期平台发现部分用户采用 AI 托管模式运营账号，通过技术手段自动生成内容、发布笔记，并在评论、私信、群聊等场景中模拟真人互动。

In response to the above situation, Xiaohongshu will implement the following governance measures for AI-managed accounts: 对于上述情况，小红书将对 AI 托管类账号实行以下治理措施：

    For ordinary accounts that occasionally use AI for ghostwriting, publishing notes, or interacting, the platform will take graduated measures such as warnings and content distribution restrictions, depending on the severity of the violation.

    For accounts directly registered, published, or interacted with via AI management tools, or accounts where all public notes on the homepage are ghostwritten by AI, the platform will impose a ban.

Shu Guanjia stated that hundreds of millions of users share their life experiences on the Xiaohongshu platform, and every real record and every sincere exchange collectively form the warm foundation of the community. 薯管家表示，数以亿计的用户在小红书平台上分享自己的生活经验，每一次真实的记录、每一次真诚的交流，共同构成了社区温暖的底色。

Therefore, Xiaohongshu strictly prohibits any behavior that uses technical means to simulate real people, create non-authentic content, or engage in false interactions. 因此，小红书严格禁止任何利用技术手段模拟真人、进行非真实内容创作或虚假互动的行为。

item.title: 🦞 399 元装龙虾，京东上线 OpenClaw 上门部署服务
item.guid: 🦞-399-元装龙虾，京东上线-OpenClaw-上门部署服务
item.description:
Recently, manufacturers such as Tencent and Kimi have launched offline installation services for the open-source AI agent OpenClaw. 近期，腾讯、Kimi 等厂商开启了线下安装开源 AI 智能体 OpenClaw 的服务。

And yesterday, JD.com also announced that it would launch the 'Remote OpenClaw Deployment Service (Pure Version)' for 399 yuan. 而在昨日，京东方面也宣布，将上线「远程 OpenClaw 部署服务（纯净版）」，售价 399 元。

It is reported that after users order the service, they can call the service hotline within 30 days from the date of purchase to schedule a professional engineer for remote one-on-one deployment. 据悉，用户下单服务后，自购买之日起 30 日内拨打服务热线即可预约专业工程师进行远程一对一部署。

item.title: 喜茶「龙井糯糯」回归
item.guid: 喜茶「龙井糯糯」回归
item.description:
Yesterday, Heytea announced the official return of 'Longjing Nuonuo'. 昨日，喜茶宣布「龙井糯糯」正式回归。

According to the introduction, Longjing Nuonuo uses fresh Longjing tea buds hand-picked from tea mountains with 'altitude mist' and 'incense ash soil', blended with buckwheat inspiration, and complemented by homemade cheese mochi. 据介绍，龙井糯糯采用长在有「海拔雾」和「香灰土」的茶山上，并且使用手采龙井鲜芽，与荞麦灵感拼配，辅以自制芝士糯糯。

Longjing Nuonuo is available starting today. 龙井糯糯即日起上线。

item.title: 《绿液惊魂》中国内地定档 3 月 28 日
item.guid: 《绿液惊魂》中国内地定档-3-月-28-日
item.description:
According to Watchmen Hollywood, the horror-comedy film 'Cold Storage' is scheduled to be released in mainland China on March 28. 据守望好莱坞消息，恐怖喜剧片《绿液惊魂》（Cold Storage）中国内地定档 3 月 28 日上映。

The film tells the story of retired agent Robert, who is forced to form a temporary team with duty officer Sweetheart and Naomi to find a way to stop the apocalypse amidst a global crisis of green liquid fungus. 影片讲述退休特工罗伯特被迫与值班员甜点心、内奥米组成临时小队，在绿液真菌蔓延全球的危机中寻找阻止末日浩劫的方法。

The film is directed by British director Jonny Campbell, starring Liam Neeson, Joe Keery, and Georgina Campbell, and was previously released in North America in February this year. 该片由英国导演强尼·坎贝尔执导，连姆·尼森、乔·基瑞、乔治娜·坎贝尔主演，此前北美已于今年 2 月上映。

item.title: 《超级马力欧银河大电影》发布终极预告
item.guid: 《超级马力欧银河大电影》发布终极预告
item.description:
According to Watchmen Hollywood, the ultimate trailer for the new 'Super Mario' movie, 'Super Mario Galaxy: The Movie', has been released. 据守望好莱坞消息，新一部「超级马力欧」电影《超级马力欧银河大电影》发布终极预告。

The film is a sequel to the animated movie 'The Super Mario Bros. Movie', telling the story of Mario and Luigi embarking on an adventure to explore an unknown galaxy to confront Bowser Jr., who is trying to rescue his father Bowser. 影片为动画电影《超级马力欧兄弟大电影》的续作，讲述了马力欧与路易吉为了对抗尝试解救父亲酷霸的酷霸 Jr. 而踏上探索未知银河的冒险的故事。

The film is directed by Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic, with Matthew Fogel as the screenwriter, and features Chris Pratt, Anya Taylor-Joy, Charlie Day, Jack Black, Keegan-Michael Key, and others as main voice actors. It will be released in the US on April 1 and in mainland China on April 3. 该片由亚伦·霍瓦斯、迈克尔·杰勒尼克执导，马修·福格尔担任编剧，克里斯·帕拉特、安雅·泰勒-乔伊、查理·戴、杰克·布莱克、吉甘-迈克尔·凯等担任主要配音，将于 4 月 1 日美国上映、4 月 3 日中国内地上映。

item.title: 《至尊马蒂》开启预售
item.guid: 《至尊马蒂》开启预售
item.description:
Yesterday, the movie 'Marty Supreme' released its Chinese-subtitled ultimate trailer and opened for pre-sale. 昨日，电影《至尊马蒂》发布中字终极预告，并开启预售。

It is reported that the film tells an original fictional story about a table tennis player, based on the American Marty Reisman. Directed by Joshua Safdie and co-written by Ronald Bronstein, starring Timothée Chalamet and Gwyneth Paltrow, produced by A24, it will be released in mainland China on March 20. 据悉，该片讲述一个关于乒乓球运动员的原创虚构故事，原型为美国人 Marty Reisman。由约书亚·萨弗迪执导并联合罗纳德·布隆斯坦编剧，提莫西·查拉梅与格温妮斯·帕特洛主演，A24 出品，中国内地将于 3 月 20 日上映。

It's worth mentioning that Timothée Chalamet recently embarked on his first trip to China to promote the film. 值得一提的是，甜茶近期还为影片宣传而开启首次中国之旅。

早报
